title: Sous-Vide Buttermilk Casabe Wrap
description: A bitter and silky weeknight dish featuring casabe wraps with a sous-vide buttermilk filling for a unique Indian-inspired flavor.
instructions: Mix the buttermilk with a pinch of salt and chop some fresh herbs for flavoring.
Place the buttermilk mixture in a bag, seal it well, and place it in the sous-vide machine for about 30 minutes.
While the buttermilk is cooking, warm up your casabe bread in a pan or oven to make them soft and pliable.
Slice the cooked buttermilk filling into thin strips.
Place each slice of warm casabe on a plate, top it with the slices of buttermilk filling, and garnish with fresh herbs for extra flavor.
Serve immediately as a refreshing wrap dish.
